creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 22 Dec 2013 21:11:33 -0600 Bryan Drewery wrote:
> What SVN REV does this apply to? I get a lot of missing files and an
> issue with devel/qt4-testlib missing after applying to r337197

The patch was made vs 337203, but before applying it please do:
svn cp  devel/qmake4/files/qconfig.cpp devel/qmake4/files/qconfig.cpp.in
svn cp devel/qt4-declarative x11-toolkits/qt4-declarative
svn cp devel/qt4-qtestlib devel/qt4-testlib
svn cp textproc/qt4-clucene textproc/clucene-qt4
svn cp www/qt4-webkit www/webkit-qt4
svn cp x11/qt4-opengl graphics/qt4-opengl

I should have mentioned it in the first place, sorry.

Max
